[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 010110100 4
1 111111010 7
2 011011101 6
3 111110000 5
4 011100011 5
5 111011100 6
6 111111101 8
7 100101111 6
